import React from 'react' import { makeStyles } from '@material-ui/core/styles' // import om from './assets/pm.png' import './Home.css' import ResponsiveGrid from './responsivegrid' const useStyles = makeStyles((theme) => ({ experience: { color: 'white', width: '100%', height: '100%', fontSize: '1rem', }, expdes: { marginLeft: '20px', }, workdiv: {}, jobdes: { minWidth: '100px', // marginLeft: '20px', display: 'flex', }, company: { display: 'block', }, duration: { marginLeft: '40px', }, projectsdiv: { padding: '20px 40px', // overflow: 'auto', // overflow: 'scroll', }, hyphen: { marginLeft: '20px', // fontWeight: 'lighter', }, projects: { height: '100%', width: '80%', marginBottom: '40px', }, })) const Projects = () => { const projects = [] const classes = useStyles() return (
Experience
Software Engineer - Full-time One Convergence Devices Pvt Ltd August 2022 to April 2023
  • Experienced Developer for DKube’s MLOps platform to simplify ML model implementation for developers
  • Hands-on experince in Kubernetes, Docker
Web Developer - Intern Jindal Trading Corperation August 2022 to April 2023
  • Built an e-commerce website for the company
  • Learnt ReactJS
Projects
) } export default Projects
